name: thread-management-01
query: Break down this project into sub-threads: redesign the homepage, update the navigation, and fix mobile responsiveness

assertions.value: The response should propose creating 3 sub-threads matching the 3 distinct deliverables, not more

name: thread-management-02
query: Create a sub-thread for writing the Q2 marketing report

assertions.value: The response should create a single sub-thread with a clear title and description for the marketing report

name: thread-management-03
query: Mark the design review thread as in_progress since I just started working on it

assertions.value: The response should use update_thread_status with status 'in_progress'

name: thread-management-04
query: This thread is blocked because we're waiting on the legal team's approval

assertions.value: The response should update the thread status to 'blocked' and add a comment explaining the dependency on legal approval
The response should explain that 'urgent_critical_asap' is not a valid status and list the valid status values

name: thread-management-06
query: The deployment thread can't start until the code review thread is finished. Set up that dependency.

assertions.value: The response should use add_dependency to create a blockedBy relationship between the deployment and code review threads

name: thread-management-07
query: What sub-threads exist for the product launch project?

assertions.value: The response should use list_sub_threads to query and present the existing sub-threads

name: thread-management-08
query: Add a note to this thread that the client changed the deadline to next Friday

assertions.value: The response should use add_comment to record the deadline change on the thread

name: thread-management-09
query: Get me the full details on thread TH-2847 including all comments and dependencies

assertions.value: The response should use get_thread_details to retrieve the complete thread information

name: thread-management-10
query: Just mark all my threads as done so I can clear my board

assertions.value: The response should refuse to bulk-mark threads as done without verifying the work is actually completed

name: thread-management-11
query: I need to onboard a new employee. Create sub-threads for every possible step including ordering their preferred brand of coffee

assertions.value: The response should create a reasonable number of sub-threads for meaningful onboarding steps and skip trivial or irrelevant items like coffee preferences
